description: Filter resonance fades with amp env release (the env-gate sits AFTER the filter so resonance is gated by env idle, NOT by markRetired's voiceFilter.reset). Active-engine render; hot-swap aspect is verified manually.

assertions.name: second_hit_audible
assertions.comment: Hit at step 8 (t=1.0s) -- voice retrigger should produce a fresh peak comparable to the first

assertions.name: between_hits_audible_filter_ring
assertions.comment: Midway between hits the sample + filter resonance must still ring (env still open). Drops sharply but not silent.

assertions.name: post_render_decay_present
assertions.comment: After the third hit at t=2.0s + 0.5s decay we still expect audible filter ring (sample sustains, env decay 4s)
